title: U.S. crude oil falls below $70, resuming losses after attack on cargo ship near Oman
summary_full: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.
summary_public: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while digesting a flurry of news from the region.
